Game: The Last Blade 2- Heart of the Samurai 1999-01-28T00:00:00-08:00 The Last Blade 2: Heart of the Samurai is a 2D fighting game which features anime-style characters that fight each other with swords, clubs, and even fishing poles. These characters pull off their special moves with that 'quarter-circle-to-half-circle' and 'double-half-circle' controller motions, reminiscent of Street Fighter. <1>http://images.launchbox-app.com/ccb27b02-cfa5-46fe-8713-d319bde26ca2.png</1> http://images.launchbox-app.com/e274dee2-ee72-4b85-a2a7-e8a0c00a617a.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/5aea7dd5-b7ea-4f81-bba0-6ba0df8881f8.jpg http://images.launchbox-app.com/5d4e6e67-197e-4ae7-8cc0-e563cbe5c139.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/a52cb675-6323-4659-92f1-ae6af6925638.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/6969db0f-c900-47cb-850d-1eb5fdb79672.png http://images.launchbox-app.com/398ca5d3-b308-4458-aaf0-2a8a0d641d0f.png 4 T - Teen Fighting SNK SNK
